---
title: "Diapause Gut Analysis"
subtitle: "2×2 Factorial Design: Temperature (11C vs 25C) × Hormone (EtOH vs JH)"
author: "Hlib Burtsev"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    keep-tex: true
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{float}
        \floatplacement{figure}{H}
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  fig-width: 20
  fig-height: 16
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(rstatix)
library(patchwork)

# Set your working directory and provide full path to the CSV
df_raw <- read.csv("~/Downloads/Current Slides - Guts.csv", 
                   header = TRUE, 
                   na.strings = c("", "NA"),
                   check.names = FALSE)
```

### Parse and tidy data (specific to the formatting we used)

```{r}
df <- df_raw %>%
  rename(
    gut_id = n_gut, 
    treatment_type = treatment_type,
    gut_type = gut_type,
    ovary_type = ovary_type,
    stains = stains,
    length_um = `length(µm)`,
    area_um2 = `area(µm^2)`,
    ph3_ant = ph3_ant,
    ph3_post = ph3_post
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    treatment_cd   = factor(if_else(str_starts(treatment_type, "c"), 
                                    "25C", "11C"),
                            levels = c("11C", "25C")),
    treatment_drug = factor(if_else(str_ends(treatment_type, "etoh"), 
                                    "EtOH", "JH"),
                            levels = c("EtOH", "JH")),
    group          = factor(paste0(treatment_cd, "_", treatment_drug),
                            levels = c("11C_JH", "11C_EtOH", "25C_JH", 
                                       "25C_EtOH")),
    ph3_ant        = as.numeric(ph3_ant),
    ph3_post       = as.numeric(ph3_post),
    ph3_total      = ph3_ant + ph3_post,
    length_um      = as.numeric(length_um),
    area_um2       = as.numeric(area_um2)
  )

# Quick sanity check
cat("Rows loaded:", nrow(df), "\n")
cat("Groups found:\n")
print(table(df$group))

# Shared colors and themes
group_colors <- c(
  "11C_JH"   = "#de2121",
  "11C_EtOH" = "#f294dc",
  "25C_JH"   = "#eb7734",
  "25C_EtOH" = "#ebd834"
)

my_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15)
  )
```

### PH3+ counts

```{r}
# Box + jitter; Kruskal-Wallis → Dunn post-hoc (BH correction) 
# + Wilcoxon for each main effect (11C/25C and EtOH/JH)
ph3_long <- df %>%
  select(gut_id, group, treatment_cd, treatment_drug,
         ph3_ant, ph3_post, ph3_total) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = c(ph3_ant, ph3_post, ph3_total),
    names_to  = "region",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(count)) %>%
  mutate(
    region = recode(region,
      ph3_ant   = "Anterior",
      ph3_post  = "Posterior",
      ph3_total = "Total"
    ),
    region = factor(region, levels = c("Anterior", "Posterior", "Total"))
  )

# Kruskal-Wallis (all 4 groups) per region
ph3_kw <- ph3_long %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  kruskal_test(count ~ group)

cat("PH3: Kruskal-Wallis (4 groups)")
print(ph3_kw %>% select(region, statistic, df, p))

# Dunn post-hoc (BH) for all pairwise comparisons 
ph3_dunn <- ph3_long %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  dunn_test(count ~ group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance("p.adj",
  cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
  symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")) %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "group", dodge = 0.8, step.increase = 0.01)

cat("PH3: Dunn post-hoc pairwise (BH-corrected)")
print(ph3_dunn %>% select(region, group1, group2, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Wilcoxon main effects
ph3_cd_test <- ph3_long %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  wilcox_test(count ~ treatment_cd) %>%
  add_significance()

ph3_drug_test <- ph3_long %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  wilcox_test(count ~ treatment_drug) %>%
  add_significance()

cat("PH3: Main effect 11C vs 25C (Wilcoxon)")
print(ph3_cd_test %>% select(region, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

cat("PH3: Main effect EtOH vs JH (Wilcoxon)")
print(ph3_drug_test %>% select(region, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

# Plot
fig_ph3 <- ggplot(ph3_long, aes(x = group, y = count, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha         = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width         = 0.6,
    color         = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(color = "black", width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ region) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 32, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.spacing    = unit(2, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(y = "PH3+ Cell Count", x = NULL)
# Add significance brackets for significant comparisons only
ph3_sig <- ph3_dunn %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

if (nrow(ph3_sig) > 0) {
  fig_ph3 <- fig_ph3 +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      ph3_sig,
      label        = "p.adj.signif",
      tip.length   = 0.01,
      step.increase = 0.12,
      size          = 12,
      bracket.size  = 1.2
    )
}

ggsave(
  filename = "fig_ph3_counts.pdf",
  plot = fig_ph3,
  width = 24,
  height = 15,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 800
)

print(fig_ph3)
```

### Morphology (length and area)

```{r}
# Box + jitter; Kruskal-Wallis → Dunn post-hoc (BH correction)
morph_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = c(length_um, area_um2),
    names_to  = "measure",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
  mutate(
    group = factor(group, levels = c("11C_JH", "11C_EtOH", "25C_JH", "25C_EtOH")),
    measure = recode(measure,
      length_um = "Length (µm)",
      area_um2  = "Area (µm²)"
    )
  )

# Kruskal-Wallis (all 4 groups) per measure
morph_kw <- morph_long %>%
  group_by(measure) %>%
  kruskal_test(value ~ group)

cat("Morphology: Kruskal-Wallis (4 groups)")
print(morph_kw %>% select(measure, statistic, df, p))

# Dunn post-hoc (BH) for all pairwise comparisons
morph_dunn <- morph_long %>%
  group_by(measure) %>%
  dunn_test(value ~ group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance("p.adj") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "group", scales = "free_y")

cat("Morphology: Dunn post-hoc pairwise (BH-corrected)")
print(morph_dunn %>% select(measure, group1, group2, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Wilcoxon main effects
morph_cd_test <- morph_long %>%
  group_by(measure) %>%
  wilcox_test(value ~ treatment_cd) %>%
  add_significance()

morph_drug_test <- morph_long %>%
  group_by(measure) %>%
  wilcox_test(value ~ treatment_drug) %>%
  add_significance()

cat("Morphology: Main effect 11C vs 25C (Wilcoxon)")
print(morph_cd_test %>% select(measure, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

cat("Morphology: Main effect EtOH vs JH (Wilcoxon)")
print(morph_drug_test %>% select(measure, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

# Plot
fig_morph <- ggplot(morph_long, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha         = 0.7,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width         = 0.5,
    color         = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(color = "black", width = 0.15, size = 3.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ measure, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "none"
  ) +
  labs(y = NULL, x = NULL)

morph_sig <- morph_dunn %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

if (nrow(morph_sig) > 0) {
  fig_morph <- fig_morph +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      morph_sig,
      label         = "p.adj.signif",
      tip.length    = 0.02,
      step.increase = 0.12,
      size          = 10,
      bracket.size  = 1.2,
      hide.ns       = TRUE
    )
}

ggsave(
  filename = "fig_morphology.pdf",
  plot = fig_morph,
  width = 24,
  height = 15,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 800
)

print(fig_morph)
```
### Delta (Dl+) Marker Proportions

```{r}
# Beta regression (main effects + interaction) per region
# + Dunn post-hoc and Wilcoxon main effects per region
# + Spatial profile (mean ± SE) and per-region boxplots
# + Mean proportion per gut summary

prop_cols <- paste0("dl_r", 1:5, "_prop")

dl_long <- df %>%
  select(gut_id, group, treatment_cd, treatment_drug, all_of(prop_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = all_of(prop_cols),
    names_to  = "region",
    values_to = "proportion"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(proportion)) %>%
  mutate(
    region_label = toupper(str_extract(region, "r\\d")),
    prop_sq = case_when(
      proportion == 0 ~ 0.001,
      proportion == 1 ~ 0.999,
      TRUE            ~ proportion
    )
  )

# Beta regression: proportion ~ temperature * hormone, per region
beta_results <- dl_long %>%
  group_by(region_label) %>%
  group_map(~ {
    tryCatch({
      m <- betareg(prop_sq ~ treatment_cd * treatment_drug,
                   data = .x, link = "logit")
      broom::tidy(m) %>%
        filter(component == "mean") %>%
        mutate(region = .y$region_label)
    }, error = function(e) {
      tibble(
        region    = .y$region_label,
        term      = NA_character_,
        estimate  = NA_real_,
        std.error = NA_real_,
        statistic = NA_real_,
        p.value   = NA_real_,
        component = NA_character_
      )
    })
  }) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  select(region, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig   = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  )

cat("Dl: Beta regression (temperature * hormone per region, BH-corrected)")
print(beta_results, n = Inf)

# Wilcoxon main effects per region
dl_cd_test <- dl_long %>%
  group_by(region_label) %>%
  wilcox_test(proportion ~ treatment_cd) %>%
  add_significance(
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  )

dl_drug_test <- dl_long %>%
  group_by(region_label) %>%
  wilcox_test(proportion ~ treatment_drug) %>%
  add_significance(
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  )

cat("Dl: Main effect 11C vs 25C (Wilcoxon per region)")
print(dl_cd_test %>% select(region_label, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

cat("Dl: Main effect EtOH vs JH (Wilcoxon per region)")
print(dl_drug_test %>% select(region_label, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

# Dunn post-hoc (all 4 groups, BH) per region
dl_dunn <- dl_long %>%
  group_by(region_label) %>%
  dunn_test(proportion ~ group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance("p.adj",
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  ) %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "group", dodge = 0.8)

cat("Dl: Dunn post-hoc pairwise (BH-corrected)")
print(dl_dunn %>% select(region_label, group1, group2, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Summary for profile plot
dl_summary <- dl_long %>%
  group_by(group, region_label) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(proportion, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_prop   = sd(proportion,  na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Shared theme for Dl plots
dl_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 0, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "top",
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 20)
  )

# Spatial profile: mean ± SE across R1-R5
fig_dl_profile <- ggplot(
  dl_summary,
  aes(x = region_label, y = mean_prop, color = group, group = group)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 2) +
  geom_point(size = 5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_prop - se_prop, ymax = mean_prop + se_prop),
    width = 0.2, linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Dl+ Proportion by Region",
    x     = "Midgut Region (Anterior → Posterior)",
    y     = NULL,
    color = NULL
  ) +
  dl_theme +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

# Per-region boxplots
dl_dunn_sig <- dl_dunn %>%
  filter(p.adj < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(region_label) %>%
  arrange(p.adj, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    # Base height: just above the data max for that region
    y.position = {
      region_max <- max(
        dl_long$proportion[dl_long$region_label == first(region_label)],
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
      # Stack brackets evenly above the data ceiling
      region_max + (row_number() * 0.07)
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Y ceiling is now the highest bracket position + a small buffer
dl_box_y_max <- if (nrow(dl_dunn_sig) > 0) {
  max(dl_dunn_sig$y.position, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.05
} else {
  max(dl_long$proportion, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2
}

fig_dl_box <- ggplot(dl_long, aes(x = group, y = proportion, fill = group)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha         = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width         = 0.6,
    color         = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(color = "black", width = 0.15, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ region_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, dl_box_y_max),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  labs(y = "Dl+ Proportion", x = NULL) +
  dl_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

if (nrow(dl_dunn_sig) > 0) {
  fig_dl_box <- fig_dl_box +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      dl_dunn_sig,
      label         = "p.adj.signif",
      tip.length    = 0.01,
      size          = 9,
      bracket.size  = 1
    )
}

# Mean Dl+ proportion per gut (averaged across R1-R5)
dl_total <- df %>%
  mutate(dl_total_prop = rowMeans(
    across(all_of(paste0("dl_r", 1:5, "_prop"))), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dl_total_prop)) %>%
  select(gut_id, group, treatment_cd, treatment_drug, dl_total_prop)

# Kruskal-Wallis + Dunn on mean proportion
dl_total_kw <- kruskal_test(dl_total, dl_total_prop ~ group)

cat("Dl mean proportion: Kruskal-Wallis")
print(dl_total_kw %>% select(statistic, df, p))

dl_total_dunn <- dl_total %>%
  dunn_test(dl_total_prop ~ group, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  add_significance("p.adj",
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  ) %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "group", dodge = 0.8)

cat("Dl mean proportion: Dunn post-hoc (BH-corrected)")
print(dl_total_dunn %>% select(group1, group2, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Wilcoxon main effects on mean proportion
dl_total_cd_test <- wilcox_test(dl_total, dl_total_prop ~ treatment_cd) %>%
  add_significance(
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  )

dl_total_drug_test <- wilcox_test(dl_total, dl_total_prop ~ treatment_drug) %>%
  add_significance(
    cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 1),
    symbols   = c("***", "**", "*", "ns")
  )

cat("Dl mean proportion: Main effect 11C vs 25C (Wilcoxon)")
print(dl_total_cd_test %>% select(group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

cat("Dl mean proportion: Main effect EtOH vs JH (Wilcoxon)")
print(dl_total_drug_test %>% select(group1, group2, statistic, p, p.signif))

# Boxplot of mean proportion per gut
dl_total_dunn_sig <- dl_total_dunn %>% filter(p.adj < 0.05)

# Compute y ceiling from bracket positions
dl_total_y_max <- if (nrow(dl_total_dunn_sig) > 0) {
  max(dl_total_dunn_sig$y.position, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15
} else {
  max(dl_total$dl_total_prop, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.2
}

fig_dl_total <- ggplot(
  dl_total,
  aes(x = group, y = dl_total_prop, fill = group)
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    alpha         = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    width         = 0.6,
    color         = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(color = "black", width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, dl_total_y_max),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Dl+ Proportion per Gut",
    y     = NULL,
    x     = NULL
  ) +
  dl_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title      = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

if (nrow(dl_total_dunn_sig) > 0) {
  fig_dl_total <- fig_dl_total +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      dl_total_dunn_sig,
      label         = "p.adj.signif",
      tip.length    = 0.01,
      step.increase = 0.12,
      size          = 10,
      bracket.size  = 1.2
    )
}

# Final assembly
dl_full_panel <- (fig_dl_profile | fig_dl_total) / fig_dl_box +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2))

ggsave(
  filename = "fig_dl_proportions_panel.pdf",
  plot = dl_full_panel,
  width = 30,
  height = 20,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 800
)

print(dl_full_panel)
```

### Ovary Status
```{r}
# Fisher's exact (overall + pairwise BH) and logistic regression
# (temperature * hormone interaction) on diapause induction

ovary_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ovary_status = factor(
      if_else(ovary_type == "a_lot_yolk", "Reproductive", "Diapaused"),
      levels = c("Reproductive", "Diapaused")
    ),
    diapaused_bin = as.integer(ovary_type != "a_lot_yolk")
  )

cat("Ovary status counts per group")
print(table(ovary_df$group, ovary_df$ovary_status))

# Fisher's exact test (all 4 groups)
ovary_fisher_overall <- fisher.test(
  table(ovary_df$group, ovary_df$ovary_status),
  simulate.p.value = TRUE
)

cat("Ovary: Fisher's exact test (4 groups)")
print(ovary_fisher_overall)

# Logistic regression: diapause ~ temperature * hormone
ovary_glm <- glm(
  diapaused_bin ~ treatment_cd * treatment_drug,
  data   = ovary_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("Ovary: Logistic regression (temperature * hormone interaction)")
print(summary(ovary_glm))

cat("Ovary: Odds ratios + 95% CI")
print(exp(cbind(OR = coef(ovary_glm), confint(ovary_glm))))

# Pairwise Fisher's exact (BH-corrected)
ovary_fisher_pw <- pairwise_fisher_test(
  table(ovary_df$group, ovary_df$ovary_status),
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj.signif = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  )

cat("Ovary: Pairwise Fisher's exact (BH-corrected)")
print(ovary_fisher_pw %>% select(group1, group2, p, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Summary: % reproductive vs diapaused per group
ovary_summary <- ovary_df %>%
  group_by(group, ovary_status) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    pct   = n / total * 100
  )

# Significant pairwise comparisons for brackets
ovary_sig <- ovary_fisher_pw %>%
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

# Y positions derived from data, only calculated if needed
y_max_data <- 103
y_bracket_start <- y_max_data + 8

if (nrow(ovary_sig) > 0) {
  ovary_sig <- ovary_sig %>%
    mutate(
      xmin       = group1,
      xmax       = group2,
      y.position = seq(
        y_bracket_start,
        by         = 8,
        length.out = nrow(ovary_sig)
      )
    )
}

# Y axis upper limit
y_upper <- if (nrow(ovary_sig) > 0) {
  max(ovary_sig$y.position) + 8
} else {
  y_bracket_start + 8
}

# Plot
ovary_colors <- c("Reproductive" = "#2196F3", "Diapaused" = "#f5b505")

fig_ovary <- ggplot(
  ovary_summary,
  aes(x = group, y = pct, fill = ovary_status)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size     = 8,
    fontface = "bold",
    color    = "white"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data        = ovary_summary %>% distinct(group, total),
    aes(x = group, y = y_max_data, label = paste0("n=", total)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size        = 7,
    fontface    = "italic"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ovary_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
    limits = c(0, y_upper)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Ovary Status per Group",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "Percentage of Flies (%)",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 22),
    legend.position  = "top",
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

if (nrow(ovary_sig) > 0) {
  fig_ovary <- fig_ovary +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      ovary_sig,
      label        = "p.adj.signif",
      xmin         = "xmin",
      xmax         = "xmax",
      y.position   = "y.position",
      tip.length   = 0.01,
      size         = 10,
      bracket.size = 1.2
    )
}


ggsave(
  filename = "fig_ovary_status.pdf",
  plot = fig_ovary,
  width = 24,
  height = 15,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 800
)

print(fig_ovary)
```
 
### LOS

```{r}
# Logistic regression (temperature * hormone interaction)
# + pairwise Fisher's exact (BH-corrected) on gut type distribution

los_data <- df %>%
  mutate(
    los       = if_else(gut_type == "normal", 0L, 1L),
    los_label = factor(
      if_else(gut_type == "normal", "Normal", "LOS"),
      levels = c("Normal", "LOS")
    ),
    group = factor(group, levels = c("11C_JH", "11C_EtOH", "25C_JH", "25C_EtOH"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gut_type))

# Logistic regression: LOS ~ temperature * hormone
los_model <- glm(
  los ~ treatment_cd * treatment_drug,
  data   = los_data,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("LOS: Logistic regression (temperature * hormone interaction)")
print(
  broom::tidy(los_model) %>%
    mutate(
      p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      sig   = case_when(
        p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE          ~ "ns"
      )
    )
)

# Pairwise Fisher's exact (BH-corrected)
group_pairs <- combn(levels(los_data$group), 2, simplify = FALSE)

fisher_results <- map_dfr(group_pairs, function(pair) {
  sub <- los_data %>% filter(group %in% pair)
  tbl <- table(sub$group, sub$los_label)
  ft  <- fisher.test(tbl)
  tibble(
    group1     = pair[1],
    group2     = pair[2],
    p.value    = ft$p.value,
    odds_ratio = ft$estimate
  )
}) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    p.adj.signif = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  )

cat("LOS: Pairwise Fisher's exact (BH-corrected)")
print(fisher_results %>% select(group1, group2, p.adj, p.adj.signif))

# Summary: % Normal vs LOS per group
los_summary <- los_data %>%
  group_by(group, los_label) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    pct   = n / total * 100
  )

cat("LOS: % per group")
print(los_summary)

# Significant pairwise comparisons for brackets
los_sig <- fisher_results %>%
  filter(p.adj.signif != "ns")

y_max_data      <- 103
y_bracket_start <- y_max_data + 8

if (nrow(los_sig) > 0) {
  los_sig <- los_sig %>%
    mutate(
      xmin       = group1,
      xmax       = group2,
      y.position = seq(
        y_bracket_start,
        by         = 8,
        length.out = nrow(los_sig)
      )
    )
}

y_upper <- if (nrow(los_sig) > 0) {
  max(los_sig$y.position) + 8
} else {
  y_bracket_start + 8
}

# Plot
los_colors <- c("Normal" = "#1656AD", "LOS" = "#FF0000")

fig_los <- ggplot(
  los_summary,
  aes(x = group, y = pct, fill = los_label)
) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size     = 8,
    fontface = "bold",
    color    = "white"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data        = los_summary %>% distinct(group, total),
    aes(x = group, y = y_max_data, label = paste0("n=", total)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size        = 7,
    fontface    = "italic"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = los_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0)),
    limits = c(0, y_upper)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Gut Type Distribution per Group",
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "Percentage of Flies (%)",
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 28) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 22),
    legend.position  = "top",
    plot.title       = element_text(size = 28, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

if (nrow(los_sig) > 0) {
  fig_los <- fig_los +
    stat_pvalue_manual(
      los_sig,
      label        = "p.adj.signif",
      xmin         = "xmin",
      xmax         = "xmax",
      y.position   = "y.position",
      tip.length   = 0.01,
      size         = 10,
      bracket.size = 1.2
    )
}

ggsave(
  filename = "fig_gut_type_los.pdf",
  plot = fig_los,
  width = 9,
  height = 15,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 800
)

print(fig_los)

# Logistic regression within 11C only (where LOS occurs)
los_11C <- los_data %>% filter(treatment_cd == "11C")

los_11C_model <- glm(
  los ~ treatment_drug,
  data   = los_11C,
  family = binomial(link = "logit")
)

cat("LOS: Logistic regression within 11C only")
print(
  broom::tidy(los_11C_model) %>%
    mutate(
      p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      sig   = case_when(
        p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
        p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE          ~ "ns"
      )
    )
)

cat("LOS: Fisher's exact test 11C_JH vs 11C_EtOH")
print(fisher.test(table(los_11C$group, los_11C$los_label)))
```

### Supplemental Statistics Table

```{r}
# Master table of all statistical tests across all outcomes
# Sections: PH3 counts, Morphology, Dl+ proportions, Ovary status, LOS

supp_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0, color = "grey40"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.spacing    = unit(1, "lines")
  )

# Collect all results

# PH3: Kruskal-Wallis
ph3_kw_tbl <- ph3_kw %>%
  select(region, statistic, df, p) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome   = "PH3+ Count",
    test      = "Kruskal-Wallis",
    comparison = "All 4 groups",
    sig = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(subgroup = region, p.value = p)

# PH3: Dunn post-hoc
ph3_dunn_tbl <- ph3_dunn %>%
  select(region, group1, group2, statistic, p.adj, p.adj.signif) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "PH3+ Count",
    test       = "Dunn (BH)",
    subgroup   = region,
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# PH3: Wilcoxon main effects
ph3_wilcox_tbl <- bind_rows(
  ph3_cd_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = region,
           factor     = "Temperature"),
  ph3_drug_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = region,
           factor     = "Hormone")
) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = "PH3+ Count",
    test    = "Wilcoxon rank-sum",
    sig     = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Morphology: Kruskal-Wallis
morph_kw_tbl <- morph_kw %>%
  select(measure, statistic, df, p) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Morphology",
    test       = "Kruskal-Wallis",
    comparison = "All 4 groups",
    sig = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(subgroup = measure, p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Morphology: Dunn post-hoc
morph_dunn_tbl <- morph_dunn %>%
  select(measure, group1, group2, statistic, p.adj, p.adj.signif) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Morphology",
    test       = "Dunn (BH)",
    subgroup   = measure,
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Morphology: Wilcoxon main effects
morph_wilcox_tbl <- bind_rows(
  morph_cd_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = measure,
           factor     = "Temperature"),
  morph_drug_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = measure,
           factor     = "Hormone")
) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = "Morphology",
    test    = "Wilcoxon rank-sum",
    sig     = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+: Beta regression
beta_tbl <- beta_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(p.value)) %>%
  select(-p.value) %>%  # Drop the unadjusted p-value
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Dl+ Proportion",
    test       = "Beta regression (BH)",
    subgroup   = region,
    comparison = term,
    sig        = sig
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+: Wilcoxon main effects per region
dl_wilcox_tbl <- bind_rows(
  dl_cd_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = region_label,
           factor     = "Temperature"),
  dl_drug_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           subgroup   = region_label,
           factor     = "Hormone")
) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = "Dl+ Proportion",
    test    = "Wilcoxon rank-sum",
    sig     = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+: Dunn post-hoc per region
dl_dunn_tbl <- dl_dunn %>%
  select(region_label, group1, group2, statistic, p.adj, p.adj.signif) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Dl+ Proportion",
    test       = "Dunn (BH)",
    subgroup   = region_label,
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+ total: Kruskal-Wallis
dl_total_kw_tbl <- dl_total_kw %>%
  select(statistic, df, p) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Dl+ Mean Proportion",
    test       = "Kruskal-Wallis",
    subgroup   = "All regions",
    comparison = "All 4 groups",
    sig = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+ total: Dunn post-hoc
dl_total_dunn_tbl <- dl_total_dunn %>%
  select(group1, group2, statistic, p.adj, p.adj.signif) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Dl+ Mean Proportion",
    test       = "Dunn (BH)",
    subgroup   = "All regions",
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Dl+ total: Wilcoxon main effects
dl_total_wilcox_tbl <- bind_rows(
  dl_total_cd_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           factor     = "Temperature"),
  dl_total_drug_test %>%
    mutate(comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
           factor     = "Hormone")
) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome  = "Dl+ Mean Proportion",
    test     = "Wilcoxon rank-sum",
    subgroup = "All regions",
    sig      = case_when(
      p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Ovary: logistic regression
ovary_glm_tbl <- broom::tidy(ovary_glm) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    outcome    = "Ovary Status",
    test       = "Logistic regression (BH)",
    subgroup   = "Diapaused",
    comparison = term,
    sig        = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-p.value) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)


# Ovary: pairwise Fisher's exact
ovary_fisher_tbl <- ovary_fisher_pw %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "Ovary Status",
    test       = "Fisher's exact (BH)",
    subgroup   = "Diapaused",
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif,
    statistic  = NA_real_
  ) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# LOS: logistic regression
los_glm_tbl <- broom::tidy(los_model) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    outcome    = "LOS",
    test       = "Logistic regression (BH)",
    subgroup   = "LOS",
    comparison = term,
    sig        = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-p.value) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# LOS: pairwise Fisher's exact
los_fisher_tbl <- fisher_results %>%
  mutate(
    outcome    = "LOS",
    test       = "Fisher's exact (BH)",
    subgroup   = "LOS",
    comparison = paste0(group1, " vs ", group2),
    sig        = p.adj.signif,
    statistic  = NA_real_
  ) %>%
  select(-p.value) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# LOS: 11C-only logistic regression
los_11C_glm_tbl <- broom::tidy(los_11C_model) %>%
  mutate(
    p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    outcome    = "LOS",
    test       = "Logistic regression 11C only (BH)",
    subgroup   = "LOS",
    comparison = term,
    sig        = case_when(
      p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.adj < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.adj < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ "ns"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-p.value) %>%
  rename(p.value = p.adj) %>%
  select(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison, statistic, p.value, sig)

# Bind all results
supp_table <- bind_rows(
  ph3_kw_tbl,
  ph3_dunn_tbl,
  ph3_wilcox_tbl,
  morph_kw_tbl,
  morph_dunn_tbl,
  morph_wilcox_tbl,
  beta_tbl,
  dl_wilcox_tbl,
  dl_dunn_tbl,
  dl_total_kw_tbl,
  dl_total_dunn_tbl,
  dl_total_wilcox_tbl,
  ovary_glm_tbl,
  ovary_fisher_tbl,
  los_glm_tbl,
  los_fisher_tbl,
  los_11C_glm_tbl
) %>%
  mutate(
    statistic = round(statistic, 3),
    p.value   = signif(p.value,  3),
    outcome   = factor(outcome, levels = c(
      "PH3+ Count",
      "Morphology",
      "Dl+ Proportion",
      "Dl+ Mean Proportion",
      "Ovary Status",
      "LOS"
    ))
  ) %>%
  arrange(outcome, test, subgroup, comparison)

cat("Supplemental statistics table: rows =", nrow(supp_table))
print(supp_table, n = Inf)

# Export as CSV
write.csv(supp_table, "supplemental_statistics.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Render as figure panels per outcome
make_supp_panel <- function(data, title_text) {
  data_clean <- data %>%
    mutate(
      p.value = formatC(p.value, format = "e", digits = 2),
      statistic = if_else(is.na(statistic), "—", as.character(statistic))
    ) %>%
    select(Test = test, Subgroup = subgroup,
           Comparison = comparison, Statistic = statistic,
           `p (BH-adj)` = p.value, Sig = sig)

  tab <- ggtexttable(
    data_clean,
    rows  = NULL,
    theme = ttheme(
      colnames.style = colnames_style(
        fill      = "grey20",
        color     = "white",
        face      = "bold",
        size      = 9,
        hjust     = 0,
        x         = 0.05
      ),
      tbody.style = tbody_style(
        fill  = c("grey97", "white"),
        size  = 8,
        hjust = 0,
        x     = 0.05
      )
    )
  )

  annotate_figure(
    tab,
    top = text_grob(title_text,
                    face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0, x = 0)
  )
}

supp_panels <- supp_table %>%
  group_by(outcome) %>%
  group_map(~ make_supp_panel(.x, as.character(.y$outcome))) %>%
  wrap_plots(ncol = 1)

ggsave(
  "supplemental_statistics.pdf",
  supp_panels,
  width  = 18,
  height = nrow(supp_table) * 0.35 + 4,
  units  = "in",
  limitsize = FALSE
)

print(supp_panels)
```
